description: Overall, I love it. Including the marketing emails. I mean, I would often unsubscribe to emails from any platform I signed up, but tugan.ai hits different with the aftercare. So yeah, its a 1000/10 for me. love!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like the feature where I get to choose how my content would sound like, especially the article to ads creation. As a copywriter, I need to make sure that I am writing to connect with my clients and not simply enticing them my offer. And Tugan.ai definitely does the job excellently.
cons: Hmmm, maybe the part where I can't process YouTube vids to LinkedIn posts because its only limited to 20mins. However, it really is not a big deal because its super understandable that AI works that way (and I've tried other platforms too, does the same).

review_title: A great AI content generation tool for social media and repurposing content
description: Content creation is not easy and time-consuming, but so essential nowadays. Tugan.ai solves that issue and is a big support for me
author: Sandrine M.
pros: Tugan.ai is straightforward to use. I love that everything gets saved automatically, this is invaluable. We can easily export the content and/or copy it. I especially love the YouTube options. Enter any YouTube URL (up to 20 min duration) and you can get a newsletter, a twitter thread or a LinkedIn post.
cons: Nothing is difficult to use, I think. It is great that things are preformatted with marketing in sight, for instance to end up with a newsletter or a twitter thread. Though it would also be great to be able to generate content of different lengths, content for a website for instance.

review_title: Tugan ai is the best platform
author: Misbah P.
pros: AI, is like the brainpower behind some of the most amazing technology we have today. It's what allows your smartphone to understand your voice commands, helps self-driving cars navigate, and even suggests what movies you might like to watch. AI is like a super-smart assistant that learns from data and gets better at tasks over time. It's pretty cool because it can help us solve complex problems and make our lives easier. But, like with any superpower, we need to use it wisely, ensuring it respects our privacy and follows ethical guidelines to make the world a better place.
cons: There is a certain limit but I am totally fine with that.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Few weeks working experience with Tigan.ai
description: As a data science master's student, I'm always looking for ways to optimize my workflow. I gave Tugan.ai a try to see if its AI could deliver unique marketing content from just a URL. I was thrilled that it rapidly generated relevant, good-quality copy that aligned with my needs. The process was fast, seamless, and required minimal effort on my end.
author: Yousef E.
pros: This tool is an outstanding tool that leverages advanced AI to automate time-consuming marketing tasks. It enables me to focus on higher-value data science work while still producing great content.
cons: Needs to be more accurate and more related to the exact meaning of the initial text. Nothing else found.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: The #1 Way to Repurpose Your Content
description: Weekly I transform YouTube videos into threads, mainly to say thank you and highlight the great YouTubers out there for spending their time teaching. This tool is helping me to engage on X and make new business partners. I recently asked for a white-label version because it is that good.
